title: carlina involucrata
intro: Carlina involucrata, also known as the Carline Thistle or Musk Thistle, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, providing several health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Carlina involucrata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
